text:
EVANGELION FINALLY is an album by Yoko Takahashi, Shirō Sagisu, and Megumi Hayashibara. It was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICA-2583, it was released on October 7, 2020.
